subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Hearken thou unto the Call from the Tongue of Oneness, from the presence of the Lord of all creation. Verily, He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه ان استمعی الندا من لسان الاحدیه من لدن مالک البریه انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
